labels.ifYouStillWantToBuild: 🔧 If You Still Want to Build

captureIntent.why: Why: Use case / problem being solved
captureIntent.constraints: Constraints: Language, platform, budget, licensing requirements

categorize.libraries: 📦 Libraries/Packages: npm, pip, cargo, etc. (free, integrate into code)
categorize.openSource: 🔧 Open Source Tools: Full applications (free, self-host)

responses.shortRecommendation: Building from scratch burns tokens, time, and creates maintenance burden
responses.matureLibrary: - Mature library exists with >1K GitHub stars

antiPatterns.auth: 🔐 Authentication systems → Use Auth0, Clerk, Supabase Auth
antiPatterns.stateManagement: 📊 State management → Consider Zustand, Redux Toolkit, Jotai
antiPatterns.formValidation: ✅ Form validation → Check out Zod, Yup, React Hook Form
antiPatterns.apiClient: 🌐 API clients → Look at Axios, ky, ofetch
antiPatterns.dateHandling: 📅 Date handling → Use date-fns, dayjs, Luxon
antiPatterns.cliTools: ⌨️ CLI tools → Consider Commander, yargs, oclif
antiPatterns.pdfGeneration: 📄 PDF generation → Use pdf-lib, jsPDF, Puppeteer
antiPatterns.emailSending: 📧 Email sending → Check Resend, SendGrid, Nodemailer
antiPatterns.cronJobs: ⏰ Cron jobs → Use node-cron, Bull, Agenda
antiPatterns.orm: 🗄️ Database ORMs → Consider Prisma, Drizzle, TypeORM
